text: Leap move is like $65 it’s a learning one just like this
text_zh: Leap move 大概65块，它是个学习类的，跟这个差不多

text: I put brain break on YouTube on the tv! My kids are 2&4 they don’t know if they’re playing a real game or not and have so much fun
text_zh: 我把YouTube上的脑力休息视频投屏到电视上了！我的孩子们2岁和4岁，他们分不清是在玩真游戏还是假的，玩得可开心了

text: find a used Xbox 360 with Kinect! literally the same concept and you can probably find one way under 250 now since it's an old system, but has tons of games. there are a lot of "learning" style / kid friendly games especially :)
text_zh: 找个二手的 Xbox 360 配 Kinect！概念完全一样，而且现在肯定能找到比 250 便宜得多的，因为是老系统了，但游戏贼多。有很多“学习型”/儿童友好的游戏，尤其是 :)

text: It’s 9am, I’m sick and I’m taking a bubble bath because my kids are playing this game. Buy the game.
text_zh: 现在是早上 9 点，我病了，正在泡澡，因为我的孩子们在玩这个游戏。快买吧。

text: Just bought the Nex Playground! It’s amazing and worth it & then do the $90/year play pass. Love it bc kids can’t just get online and talk to others like Xbox or PlayStation
text_zh: 刚买了Nex Playground！太棒了，值了，还要花90美元/年的Play Pass。我喜欢是因为孩子们不能像Xbox或PlayStation那样随便上网聊天。

text: It’s also $90 a year to get unlimited access to all the games. My kids love it though.
text_zh: 而且一年 90 美元才能无限畅玩所有游戏。不过我孩子很喜欢。

text: I have this and nothing will compare like people are saying. they have the newest character games and constantly update the games.
text_zh: 我有这个，而且就像别人说的，没什么能比得上。他们有最新的角色游戏，而且不断更新游戏。

text: I say $250 is great compared to all the other consoles and stuff we have these days
text_zh: 我觉得 250 对比现在其他所有游戏机什么的，已经很棒了

text: Ugh my kids loved it the first week and haven’t touched it since! That was December 🤣
text_zh: 唉，我孩子喜欢了一个星期，然后就再也没碰过！那是十二月的事了🤣

text: just find a used wii
text_zh: 随便找个二手的Wii就行

text: We have it, my kids have been playing with it every day. It’s easy for kids to navigate and do it by themselves. It’s so much fun for the whole family. It helps them be active so they’re tired by bedtime.
text_zh: 我们有，我孩子们每天都在玩。孩子们很容易操作，可以自己玩。全家人都玩得很开心。让他们动起来，晚上就能睡个好觉。

text: I had an Xbox Kinect as a kid (same concept) and we were really into it for like a year then rarely used it. The games get old.
text_zh: 我小时候有个Xbox Kinect（概念一样），我们玩了一年左右就很少用了。游戏玩久了会腻。

text: I love it! I use to for exercise videos for me as well. It comes with 5 games. There is an annual play pass for $89 a year that unlocks 60+ games. It sounds expensive but a lot of the other game systems are $50-$60 per game!
text_zh: 我喜欢它！我也用它来做运动视频。它自带5个游戏。每年有一个89美元的Play Pass，可以解锁60多个游戏。听起来挺贵的，但很多其他游戏主机一个游戏就要50-60美元！

text: Just went to Sam’s club to buy it. The kids love it. Switch 2 will be for myself 😂
text_zh: 刚去Sam's club买了。孩子们好喜欢。Switch 2就留给自己了😂

text: I have it, I love it. They tend to do flash sales on their lives
text_zh: 我有，我爱它。他们通常会在直播时进行限时促销

text: My aunt does foster care and SWEARS by it.
text_zh: 我姨妈是做寄养家庭的，她发誓说这个好用。

text: This app has me so jaded the second I saw the video and "deinfluence me from this product" I was positive it was going to be talking about the kid 😂 glad I was wrong.
text_zh: 这个app把我搞得好麻木，我一看视频，就觉得“劝我别买这个产品”，我一开始就猜到是在说那个孩子 😂 幸好我猜错了。

text: We got it last Christmas and I cannot recommend enough! People thought we were crazy bc no one knew what it was. We use it every single day!
text_zh: 我们去年圣诞节买的，我强烈推荐！人们觉得我们疯了，因为没人知道这是什么。我们每天都用！

text: 250? That’s all lol you better save a hundred each paycheck and get it for them
text_zh: 250？就这点？哈哈，你最好每个月发工资都存一点给他们买。

text: It’s on sale rn at Walmart if you have Walmart+ for $199!!
text_zh: 沃尔玛现在打折呢，如果你有沃尔玛+会员，199美元就能买到！

text: 250 AND a forced monthly subscription, hell no. I rather buy an Xbox kintect
text_zh: 250 美元还要强制月费，去你的。我宁愿买个 Xbox Kinect

text: I just bought one for $180 on TikTok with $20 coupon who knows if we’ll use it but I’m a shopping addict so we’ll see 😂
text_zh: 我刚在TikTok上用20块优惠券花了180块买了一个，不知道会不会用，但我是个购物狂，所以走着瞧吧 😂

text: Love it but you have to pay a subscription for the character games so keep that in mind!
text_zh: 喜欢！但角色游戏需要订阅，大家注意了！

text: Compared to me dropping 500$ on my series x I gotta say it’s worth it for my kids😂
text_zh: 跟我花了500美元买Series X比起来，我觉得这个对我的孩子们来说值了😂

text: We JUST got this. I didn’t think it would be worth it and it’s so great. Keeps my boys active on rainy or hot days!!
text_zh: 我们刚买了。我本来不觉得值，结果超棒。下雨天或者天热的时候能让我的儿子们动起来！！

text: Xbox Kinect with fruit ninja! my kids played that starting over a decade ago haha it ages well even for like adult bbqs lolol
text_zh: Xbox Kinect加上水果忍者！我孩子十几年前就开始玩了哈哈，它很耐玩，大人聚会也能玩 lolol

text: to overstimulating for a 3 year old
text_zh: 对3岁小孩来说太刺激了

text: Amazon prime has it for $200 right now. Its so worth the money
text_zh: 亚马逊Prime现在卖200美元。非常值

text: Would you pay for it at 10$ for 25 days? lol 😁
text_zh: 10美元玩25天，你愿意付吗？lol 😁

text: do it
text_zh: 搞起来

text: My girls love it but I got it under 200 stacking coupons and promotions at target keep in mind if you want all the games it’s 87 dollars I think a year, and you keep automatically getting every new game that comes out
text_zh: 我的女儿们很喜欢，但我是在 Target 叠了优惠券和促销活动才200刀不到买的，记住，如果你想要所有游戏，一年要87刀，而且你还会自动获得每一个新出的游戏。

text: I love it. only complaint is when an adult and child play (two different heights) the sensors tend to get confused. but it's fun and if you're on a weightliss journey it definitely helps
text_zh: 我喜欢它。唯一的抱怨是当一个成年人和一个孩子玩的时候（两个不同身高），传感器容易出错。但它很有趣，如果你正在减肥，它确实有帮助

text: The Xbox Kinect is the closest thing to this for cheap.
text_zh: Xbox Kinect是最接近的便宜货了。

text: Literally the PlayStation eye toy 😭
text_zh: 简直就是PlayStation的Eye Toy 😭

text: my babies loved it we just got it sunday and has all of us working out it has preschool sames and fitness for adults i got mine with klarna 4 payments of 68 and the membership i bought at target 4 payments of 22 🤷‍♀️and I dont regret it all and I got this cool stand on Amazon
text_zh: 我的宝贝们超爱它，我们刚收到周日就让全家都动起来了，有适合学龄前儿童的游戏，也有适合成人的健身，我用 Klarna 付了 4 期 68 美元，会员是在 Target 付的 4 期 22 美元 🤷‍♀️，我一点都不后悔，还在亚马逊买了个很酷的支架

text: Honestly I cannot my daughter got this for Christmas and it’s amazing. Rainy days and leftover energy before bed don’t bother me anymore! I can’t recommend this enough. They are constantly coming out with new games even for littles!!!
text_zh: 说实话我真的不行…我女儿圣诞节收到的这个，太棒了。下雨天和睡前还有精力充沛的时候都不再困扰我了！我极力推荐。他们一直在出新的游戏，还有适合小小孩的！！！

text: I used xbox kinect i would always play kinect sporta
text_zh: 我用过Xbox Kinect，我总是玩Kinect Sports

text: Get him this this wii bundle costs $89 comes with four nunchucks four controllers, the power, cable and Wii sports and Mario kart and super Mario bros Wii and it comes with the sensor bar
text_zh: 给他买这个，这个 Wii 套装是 89 美元，带四个 Nunchuck，四个控制器，电源线，Wii Sports，马里奥赛车和超级马里奥兄弟 Wii，还有传感器条

text: Think about all the money you would spend on outings, arcades, bowling, parks lol this literally has all that from the comfort of your home!! One price and it’s yours forever and only 90$ for a year of unlimited access to all games and new games…!! A steal in my opinion!!! First day having it my 3 year old played for 5 hours…🤣😭 AND there’s plenty of fun games and fitness activities for adults as well!! Highly recommend you won’t be disappointed 🤗
text_zh: 想想你在外面玩的花销，游戏厅、保龄球、公园什么的，这个在家里就能全有！！一次付费，永久拥有，而且一年无限玩所有游戏和新游戏才90美元……！！在我看来简直是抢劫！！！第一天我三岁的孩子就玩了5个小时……🤣😭 而且大人也有很多好玩的游戏和健身活动！！强烈推荐，绝对不会失望 🤗

text: im on Amazon right now for $180
text_zh: 我现在在亚马逊上看了，180美元

text: It’s only $199 right now!! Y’all check out my latest video of my son playing it! He loves it
text_zh: 它现在只要199美元！！大家快去看看我最新的视频，我儿子在玩！他爱死了

text: You can already play fruit ninja on a phone or tablet
text_zh: 手机或平板上也能玩水果忍者了

text: check out their Facebook group. I have been using the nex since it came out. it is amazing, but their customer service is TOP TIER! the head software people still interact with customers on FB and are always taking suggestions and tweaking things based on customer suggestion
text_zh: 去看看他们的 Facebook 群组。我自从 Nex 出来就一直在用了。它很棒，但他们的客户服务是顶级的！负责软件的头头们还在 Facebook 上和顾客互动，总是听取建议并根据顾客建议进行调整

text: We just got it and my entire family is obsessed with it! I didn’t know when I bought it that it also had a lot of learning activities and workout specific things like Zumba and boxing. This is one of the best things a family to get for themselves! Keeps family time active and brings everyone together
text_zh: 我们刚买了它，我的全家人都为之着迷！我买的时候不知道它还有很多学习活动和像尊巴、拳击这样的健身项目。这是家人可以给自己买的最棒的东西之一！让家庭时光动起来，让大家聚在一起

text: I won’t de influence you because we love our NEX 😅 just know you do have to pay for the play pass to get all the games.
text_zh: 我不会劝你打消念头的，因为我们很爱我们的NEX 😅 只不过你知道，要玩到所有游戏都需要付费Play Pass。

text: My sons birthday is coming up and I really wanna get this for him but $250 🫠
text_zh: 我儿子快过生日了，我真想给他买这个，但要250刀 🫠

text: My mom bought this for all her grandbabies to play at her house and they love it! It’s great when it’s rainy or cold and they need to burn off some energy. It also has all their favorite characters
text_zh: 我妈给我所有孙辈在她家买了这个，他们可喜欢了！下雨或者天冷的时候孩子们需要消耗精力，这个太棒了。里面还有他们最喜欢的角色

text: I got it from target at Xmas. Used a 40% off 1 toy item then my red car. BUT there is a 10$/year subscription for it too
text_zh: 我圣诞节在Target买的。用了一个玩具40% off，然后用了我的Red card。但是它还有10美元/年的订阅费。

text: You have to pay 80 a year to keep ur games and get new ones it only comes with 5 ur paying 250 for what try the leap frog move its only 60$ and no subscription
text_zh: 你得每年付80美元才能保留你的游戏并获得新游戏，它只带5个游戏，你花了250美元买的是什么？试试 Leap Frog Move，它才60美元，而且没有订阅费。

text: It’s the absolute best. It does come with a subscription that you have to purchase but they are constantly uploading new games
text_zh: 这是绝对最好的。它确实需要购买订阅服务，但他们一直在上传新游戏

text: Dude I just got it today and the kids haven’t stopped playing. Fr fr IF you have the money to buy it and get the game pass I say go for it! It’s expensive for sure but without the game pass there is only like 5 games. With the games pass it’s definitely more but, but again, expensive. I caved and so far no regrets!
text_zh: 哥们，我今天刚拿到，孩子们就没停下来玩。真的真的，如果你有钱买，并且买了游戏通行证，我建议你买！肯定很贵，但没有游戏通行证的话，只有大约 5 款游戏。有了游戏通行证，游戏肯定多了，但还是贵。我最终还是买了，到目前为止我一点也不后悔！

text: A wii
text_zh: 一个 Wii

text: We love ours!
text_zh: 我们很喜欢我们的！

text: 😂Hello, make a friend
text_zh: 😂你好，交个朋友

text: Yes!! We just got one for my kids and 1000% recommended
text_zh: 是的！！我们刚给我的孩子们买了一个，1000%推荐

text: It’s fun for 2 weeks. Then they move on. I use it more for home workouts
text_zh: 玩两周就没意思了。然后他们就玩别的了。我主要用它来做居家锻炼

text: We absolutely love ours my son is three and plays it non stop!! He works up such a sweat they have workout ones too that are good for adults!!!
text_zh: 我们非常喜欢我们的！我儿子才三岁，玩个不停！！他能出很多汗，他们也有适合大人的健身游戏！！！

text: I'm in Australia and it costs $514 on Amazon 😭
text_zh: 我在澳大利亚，亚马逊上要514美元 😭

text: Looks super overstimulating
text_zh: 看起来超级过度刺激

text: It was going to be my sons Christmas gift. However I decided to buy it today for me to exercise again lol
text_zh: 本来是我儿子的圣诞礼物。不过我今天决定自己买了，这样我又能运动了哈哈

text: I have it and my kids LOVE it. I do the workouts on it. I don’t think it compares to any of the consoles other people always suggest.
text_zh: 我有它，我的孩子们超爱！我也在上面做锻炼。我觉得它没法跟大家老是推荐的那些主机比。

text: Apparently it’s only $200 at Walmart 😒 got mine from tik tok shop came in yesterday. Spent 250 not including shipping But it’s really fun!!
text_zh: 据说沃尔玛只要200美元😒 我在TikTok小店买的，昨天到的。花了250，还没算运费。但真的挺好玩的！！

text: It’s so good! And there is Zumba on it that I play!
text_zh: 太棒了！而且上面还有我玩得Zumba！

text: I just ordered this for my daughter's birthday. my husband said his switch can do this too but I like the idea that she doesn't have to hold a controller
text_zh: 我刚给我女儿买的，她生日礼物。我老公说他的 Switch 也能这样玩，但我喜欢她不用拿遥控器的这个想法

text: If you can find a live on here for it I have see. It for $189
text_zh: 如果在这上面看到有直播卖的，我见过189刀的

text: It's worth it. We got it and it's so much fun. A great workout too with games like Zumba.
text_zh: 太值了。我们买了，玩得超级开心。玩 Zumba 这些游戏还能锻炼身体。

text: Saw it for $150 at Sam’s club yesterday!!
text_zh: 昨天在 Sam’s club 看到卖 150 美元！

text: I wanted to say this is Wii on crack... but Wii will always be better
text_zh: 我想说这是开了加速的 Wii... 但 Wii 永远是最好的

text: It’s amazing! My 3 boys aged 8, 6 and 3 love it. Youll love it
text_zh: 太棒了！我三个儿子，8岁、6岁和3岁都超爱。你们肯定也会喜欢的

text: Alternativley eye toy on ps2 is similar but older tech and has a tonnn of games
text_zh: 或者 PS2 上的 EyeToy 类似，但技术老旧，而且有很多游戏

text: Girl we saw this at Sam’s and ALMOST bought it too 😂 if you buy it we are coming over 🤭
text_zh: 姐妹，我们在Sam's看到了这个，差点也买了 😂 如果你买了，我们就过来玩 🤭

text: i just bought one. you will not regret it! also they are on sale for 50 bucks off on their website!!!
text_zh: 我刚买了一个。你绝对不会后悔！而且官网还有50美元的折扣！！！

text: YOU NEED IT. it’s amazing.
text_zh: 你必须得买！它太棒了。

text: I have this and it is very well worth the money. My husband and I play along with all 5 of our kids 3-13! 💕 Highly recommend
text_zh: 我有这个，非常值。我和我丈夫还有我们5个孩子（3-13岁）一起玩！💕强烈推荐

text: used xbox 360 + kinect or used wii (like $60-$80 by this point)
text_zh: 二手 Xbox 360 + Kinect 或者二手 Wii（现在大概 60-80 美元）

text: honestly. for most game systems $250 is a steal 😭 usually ur paying $500+ but try Klarna. Split into two payments month. Usually about 4 payments :D or backmarket! they sell refurbished items. bought 3 phones, 2 laptops, and an ipad for cheap and u can use klarna
text_zh: 老实说，对于大多数游戏系统来说，250美元简直是白菜价 😭 通常要花500美元以上，但可以试试Klarna。分两期付款。通常是4期：D 或者 Backmarket！他们卖翻新产品。我便宜买过3部手机、2台笔记本和一台iPad，还能用Klarna。

text: I just installed this last night. I don’t have wifi so I used my hotspot on my phone to do the one time install… BEST decision. My son can turn the tv on alone and get to work. This is his fav game so far as well. I purchased it on their TikTok live event for $200.
text_zh: 我昨晚刚装好。我没有 Wi-Fi，就用了手机热点进行了一次性安装… 最棒的决定。我儿子现在可以自己开电视然后开始玩了。这也是他最喜欢的游戏。我在他们的 TikTok 直播活动上200刀买的。

text: WE LOVE IT!!! And if you buy it when they are LIVE you can get like $100 OFF!!!👏👏👏
text_zh: 我们超爱它！！！而且你们在直播时买能便宜 100 美元！！！👏👏👏

text: I’m trying to be deinfluenced too but like…. I kinda want one
text_zh: 我试着被“去影响”，但是……我有点想要一个

text: 100 percent recommend it.
I’d save for it and maybe by the time you have enough it’ll go on sale! The holidays are coming up😁 sometimes also if you get it directly from them like a main website they offer discounts
text_zh: 我会攒钱买的，也许等你攒够了它就打折了！节假日快到了😁 有时候如果你直接从官网买，他们会提供折扣

text: Amazon had it for $150
text_zh: 亚马逊卖150美元

text: I’ve been debating on getting this but it’s so expensive 😭
text_zh: 我一直在犹豫要不要买，但太贵了😭

text: PLEASE GET IT FOR YOUR FAMILY. some of my favorite memories are with my sister and Xbox Kinect. Literally going to save up to get one of these 😂
text_zh: 快给你的家人买一个。我最美好的回忆之一就是和我的妹妹一起玩 Xbox Kinect。真的要去攒钱买一个 😂

text: We have one, my kids 9 & 11 play it all the time but honestly, most games are geared towards younger kids. The play is excellent and so easy for kids. I had the Kinect years ago and Nex works way better
text_zh: 我们有一个，我孩子 9 岁和 11 岁，天天玩，但说实话，大部分游戏都面向更小的孩子。玩法很棒，对孩子们来说超简单。我以前有 Kinect，Nex 比那个好用多了

text: We go through phases with it!
text_zh: 我们玩这个都有阶段性的！

text: I’m gonna take my boys to Best Buy to see if they’ll play with it first before I buy one 😂
text_zh: 我要带我儿子们去百思买看看他们是否会先玩玩，再决定买不买 😂

text: I have it and we love it! I need another one for my grands.
text_zh: 我有，我们很喜欢！我还需要一个给我的孙子孙女们。

text: We have this and all 5 boys love it and I use it to work out as well. No controllers needed. And my three older boys even like it
text_zh: 我们有这个，5 个儿子都喜欢，我也用来锻炼。不需要控制器。我三个大的儿子也喜欢

text: Amazon prime days sales
text_zh: 亚马逊Prime Day促销

text: Buy it. Kids exercising while playing video games. It’s a winner
text_zh: 买吧。孩子们一边玩游戏一边运动。这简直是赢家

text: We have it and it’s so much fun. Kids can navigate easily, it keeps them active and as an adult the games are pretty fun
text_zh: 我们有这个，玩起来太有趣了。孩子们可以轻松上手，让他们保持活跃，而且大人玩也挺有意思的

text: Amazon has them for $50 off for their prime week. We just bought one and love it!
text_zh: 亚马逊Prime会员周有8折。我们刚买了一个，超喜欢！

text: Wait for it to go on sale during the holidays !
text_zh: 等到节假日打折的时候再买！

text: We love ours sorry! It’s constantly coming up with New games so the price is good to me!
text_zh: 我们爱我们的（产品），抱歉！它一直在出新游戏，所以对我来说价格很值！

text: It’s called a Wii…
text_zh: 这东西叫Wii……

text: So is this the same concept as a wii?
text_zh: 所以这个跟 Wii 是一个概念吗？

text: Yes I can recommend
text_zh: 是的，我可以推荐

text: It’s on my showcase
text_zh: 在我展示柜里

text: Just bought one! Looks so fun!
text_zh: 刚买了一个！看起来太好玩了！

text: Black Friday $199
text_zh: 黑色星期五 199美元

text: It’s called a Wii😂
text_zh: 那叫 Wii 好吗😂

text: It’s 100% worth it!
text_zh: 绝对值！

text: Order it online it’s cheaper but my kids love it.
text_zh: 在网上买吧，便宜点，我孩子特别喜欢。

text: It’s $199 on tiktok shop right now
text_zh: 现在TikTok商店卖199美元

text: Have it, my 3 year old loves it and there’s games for adults along with fitness workouts too
text_zh: 有这个，我三岁的孩子很喜欢，还有给大人玩的游戏和健身课程。

text: I have it! Absolutely love it!!!!!
text_zh: 我有了！非常喜欢！！！！！

text: It’s on my showcase on here it’s cheaper on TikTok and you get 10% off too and free shipping. It’s like 203$ so worth it
text_zh: 它在我这里有展示，在TikTok上更便宜，还有10%的折扣和免运费。大概203美元，很值

text: I have it! And it’s in my showcase!! It’s so good!
text_zh: 我有！它在我的展示柜里！！它太棒了！

text: I just bought this today and got the year membership to all the games for $89 I’m so happy with it lol my boys are obsessed
text_zh: 我今天刚买了，还买了全年的游戏会员，花了89美元，我太高兴了 lol 我的孩子们都迷上了

text: We love ours! My girls use it every day to get the last wiggles out before bed
text_zh: 我们超爱它！我女儿每天睡前都用它来消耗最后的精力

text: We have it and our whole family loves it. So many games and work out stuff. It’s worth it
text_zh: 我们有这个，全家都爱死了。好多游戏和健身项目。很值

text: It’s $199 with free shipping on the next playground website! I just bought it today LOL
text_zh: Nex Playground 官网上有卖，199 美元还免运费！我今天刚下单 LOL

text: We have one, we love it! We do the activities with the kids and we all have fun
text_zh: 我们有一个，我们爱死了！我们跟孩子们一起玩，大家都玩得很开心

text: Ok, we have this and it is soooo fun!!! We love it and play it nearly everyday. Buy it if you haven’t already.
text_zh: 好的，我们有这个，真的超好玩！！！我们很喜欢，几乎每天都玩。还没买的赶紧买。

text: get a Wii for 60 bucks with the remote and cords
text_zh: 花60美元买个Wii吧，带手柄和线

text: Yes! We just bought it and LOVE It!
text_zh: 太棒了！我们刚买了，超爱！

text: Just purchased on prime day and it is amazing ! So many games for our 3 yr old ! He loves it !
text_zh: 刚在 Prime Day 买的，太棒了！给我们的 3 岁孩子玩有好多游戏！他超爱！

text: The way my kids want this ! They are on the spectrum and we’re going crazy for it 😩 so I’m really here to say … get it 🤷🏽‍♀️🤭
text_zh: 我孩子想要这个的样子！他们有自闭症谱系障碍，看到这个都疯了😩 所以我真的想说……买吧🤷🏽‍♀️🤭

text: 250 for that is a steal ngl
text_zh: 250美元买这个，说实话是抢到了

text: It’s on sale on Amazon today 170
text_zh: 今天亚马逊打折，170

text: I love my Nex playground. Best money I have spent!!
text_zh: 我喜欢我的Nex游乐场。是我花过的最值的钱！！

text: It’s 199 at Sam’s right now!!!
text_zh: 我现在在Sam's那里是199！

text: It’s on sale for 199 rn! Def worth it
text_zh: 现在打折卖199！绝对值

text: We love ours
text_zh: 我们爱我们买的那个

text: I highly recommend this, its works for a great birthday present too, they have alot of fun game son the play pass aswell
text_zh: 我强烈推荐这个，它也是很棒的生日礼物，他们 Play Pass 上还有很多好玩的游戏。

text: It’s 200 at target
text_zh: Target 卖 200

text: This is on our Christmas list
text_zh: 这是我们圣诞愿望清单上的！

text: Recommended 🥰
text_zh: 推荐 🥰

text: My son loves this game definitely worth it
text_zh: 我儿子超爱这个游戏，绝对值

text: buy it!! i love it!! i bought it for my son but pay it more myself!! order it on flash sale from TT shop for 174!!💪🏽
text_zh: 买！我太喜欢了！本来是给我儿子买的，结果我自己玩得更多！在TT商店打折的时候才174买的！！💪🏽

text: I’m so sorry - I can only INFLUENCE you to buy this. 🙈🙈 I held out for so long but we LOVE it - me included. My daughter and I have dance battles on the daily!
text_zh: 非常抱歉——我只能“影响”你买这个。🙈🙈 我犹豫了很久，但我们都爱死了——包括我。我女儿和我每天都要跳舞大战！

text: get it!!! my girls just got one and it is awesome!! totally worth the money
text_zh: 买它！！！我的女儿们刚买了一个，太棒了！！完全值回票价

text: Buy an Xbox 360 slim with a Kinect. They got tons of games like this
text_zh: 买个Xbox 360 slim带Kinect的。有很多这种游戏

text: We absolutely LOVE our nex playground!
text_zh: 我们超级喜欢我们的 Nex 游乐场！

text: You have pay $100 a year to play any of the fun games. You only get 4 included.
text_zh: 你每年要花 100 美元才能玩到那些好玩的游戏。总共只有 4 个是包含在内的。

text: My kids love it! And new games are added every month!
text_zh: 我的孩子们超喜欢！每个月还添加新游戏！

text: We have it and me and my husband play it the most! Such a good workout!
text_zh: 我们买了，我和我老公玩得最多！锻炼效果超好！

text: we have one and my kids play it all the time!! our friends love it too.
text_zh: 我们有一个，我的孩子们玩得停不下来！！我们的朋友也很喜欢。

text: We love this!! All my kids (3/7/11) play on it daily. Worth the investment
text_zh: 我们太喜欢这个了！！我的孩子们（3/7/11岁）每天都在玩。值这个投资

text: An xbox 360 will work much better, a connect and xbox is $150. Kinect games are $1-$10 used, you get parental controls, more games and more capability (education games/movies) and save money
text_zh: Xbox 360 会好很多，一个 Kinect 和 Xbox 150 美元。Kinect 游戏二手1-10美元，你可以有家长控制、更多游戏和更多功能（教育游戏/电影），还能省钱

text: my bf just bought a brand new in the box xbox 360 with the kinect system for $140 on amazon. It’s the same concept but with a lot more game possibilities!
text_zh: 我男朋友刚在亚马逊上花 140 美元买了一个全新的、盒装的 Xbox 360 和 Kinect 系统。概念一样，但游戏选择多多了！

text: We love the nex playground
text_zh: 我们很喜欢nex playground

text: this is literally an xbox kinect.
text_zh: 这玩意儿就是个 Xbox Kinect。

text: Yea gotta agree with the Xbox Kinect. Was my favorite thing for years. Spent so many summers playing just dance and other stuff all day
text_zh: 是的，我得同意Xbox Kinect。好多年来都是我最喜欢的。好几个夏天我整天都在玩Just Dance和其他东西。

text: If you already have a Nintendo switch get Mario party, rayman rabbits, ring fit etc and it’s the same concept
text_zh: 如果你已经有了任天堂Switch，那就买马里奥派对、雷曼兔、环式健身等等，概念是一样的

text: commenting because this post influenced me to buy this for my younger kiddos (we also just got the Nintendo switch 2 but they can't really play it& truthfully the NS2 is mine 😜) and so far all the kids are having a blast. didn't like the 90 dollar subscription you have to pay to get access to all the games though.
text_zh: 评论是因为这个帖子让我决定给我家小宝贝们买这个（我们刚买了 Nintendo Switch 2，但他们根本玩不了，说实话 NS2 是我的😜），到目前为止孩子们玩得都很开心。就是有点不喜欢那个要90美元才能解锁所有游戏的订阅费。

text: Nintendo Wii that’s a all I have to say
text_zh: 任天堂Wii，我只想说这个

text: Get it!!!! I have the best time with my kids!💕
text_zh: 买！我跟我孩子玩得可开心了！💕

text: It'll be dead and have little to no support in like 2 years. This is not an original situation
text_zh: 大概2年后它就会过时，基本没啥支持了。这不是什么新鲜事

text: My mom has this at her house. Im buying one for my house lmao
text_zh: 我妈家就有这个，我得给我家也买一个哈哈

text: My almost 3 year old LOVES it
text_zh: 我快3岁的孩子超爱！

text: My mom used to say play now cause there ain’t any at home 😂😂😂😂💯
text_zh: 我妈以前总说“赶紧玩，家里可没有了” 😂😂😂😂💯

text: Just get him a Wii with Wii sports
text_zh: 直接给他买个 Wii 和 Wii Sports

text: Plus a yearly subscription of $85
text_zh: 外加每年85美元的订阅费

text: My niece has it she’s 4 she loves it she’s been playing it for 6 hours straight but just buy the 89$ year game pass and you can unlock all the games
text_zh: 我侄女有，她4岁，超级喜欢，玩了6个小时了，但是直接买89美元一年的游戏通行证，就可以解锁所有游戏了

text: Where is everyone buying it I can only find them on Amazon for $500+
text_zh: 大家都是在哪儿买的？我只能在亚马逊上看到500多美元的

text: It’s $199 on TikTok shop rn!!
text_zh: 现在 TikTok Shop 上是199美元！！

text: yes, his shoes are on backwards 🤣
text_zh: 是的，他的鞋子穿反了 🤣

text: from a teens perspective I would say it’s worth it butttt you have to have a pass to play more games and it has really educational content for younger kids!
text_zh: 从一个青少年角度来说，我觉得值，但是你得有个通行证才能玩更多游戏，而且它有很多对小孩很有教育意义的内容！

text: I love mines!! I’m 46 and I play it everyday. My family loves it to. Now there is a $86 subscription for unlimited games but it’s worth it. Great workout games also.
text_zh: 我爱死我的了！我46岁了，每天都玩。我全家也都爱玩。现在有个86美元的订阅费可以玩所有游戏，但值得。还有很棒的健身游戏。

text: 250 and game console sounds like heaven in the same sentence wym
text_zh: 250和游戏机在同一句话里听起来就像天堂，你是说啥

text: Buyawii
text_zh: 买个 Wii

text: I have a PS5 Pro and just got this and it’s fun for the family and the work ours are amazing! It gets your kids burning so much energy on the games
text_zh: 我有一个 PS5 Pro，刚买了它，家人一起玩很开心，里面的运动项目太棒了！能让孩子们消耗掉好多精力。

text: I got it, and I just did the affirm monthly payments its only 26$ a month. But I pay 30 to pay it off quicker.
text_zh: 我买了，我做了 Affirm 的月供，每个月只要 26 美元。但我付 30 美元，这样可以更快还清。

text: had lots of fun....but need someone to tell you if it's worth it? or are you asking if there's a cheaper alternative?? 😆😂
text_zh: 玩得很开心....但需要有人告诉你值不值？还是你想问有没有更便宜的替代品？？ 😆😂

text: I think its way better then most technology stuff for kids now a days
text_zh: 我觉得这比现在大部分儿童科技产品都好多了

text: please just buy a wii or a wii u.
text_zh: 拜托，直接买个 Wii 或者 Wii U 吧。

text: buy a wii
text_zh: 买个 Wii

text: Wii is the og from this ripoff, 95-130 dollars
text_zh: Wii才是这个骗局的鼻祖，95-130美元

text: get a Wii 🥰🥰
text_zh: 买个 Wii 吧 🥰🥰

text: It’s worth the money! 👏 had ours for 2 years now.
text_zh: 物超所值！👏 我们家用了 2 年了。

text: Yes 100% please get it!! Could take some getting used to but so fun my whole family loves it! 💕
text_zh: 是的，100% 推荐入手！！可能需要点时间适应，但超级好玩，我全家都喜欢！💕

text: Love ours ! Sorry ☹️
text_zh: 喜欢我们的！抱歉 ☹️

text: I figured I’d wait till my daughter is 5 she’s 3 now. But I did get it for my nephews 7-11
text_zh: 我本打算等我女儿5岁再给她买，她现在3岁。但我给她7-11岁的侄子们买了

text: At Walmart, it’s cheaper
text_zh: 在沃尔玛买，更便宜

text: just bought 1 and can hardly wait to add it to the rest of the systems we have
text_zh: 刚买了一个，迫不及待想把它加到我们其他的游戏机里了

text: 250$ plus the 100$ yearly subscription fees
text_zh: 250 美元再加上 100 美元的年费

text: get a switch, you both can play
text_zh: 买个 Switch 吧，你们俩都能玩

text: the wii is better but if they cant use remotes this is better
text_zh: Wii更好，但如果他们用不了遥控器，这个就更好

text: my family loves it . keeps them distracted for at least an hour and they have fun
text_zh: 我全家都喜欢。能让他们分心至少一个小时，而且他们玩得很开心

text: Completely worth it for our family. Not only do our 5 and 3 yr old love it but it has really good workout games for us adults. It’s fun enjoyable and when people come over we always throw it on. Constantly updating with new games. It’s just a really really fun thing. It feels like how the Wii felt when it first came out. Just an amazing gaming system for kids they even have learning games.
text_zh: 对我们一家来说完全值了。不仅我们 5 岁和 3 岁的孩子喜欢，我们大人也有很棒的健身游戏。有趣，好玩，有朋友来我们总是会拿出来玩。不断更新新游戏。真的非常非常有趣。感觉就像 Wii 刚出来时那样。一个很棒的儿童游戏系统，他们甚至还有学习游戏。

text: My kids are loving this thing! I have it in my showcase if anyone wants to support a mama out 😍😍😍
text_zh: 我的孩子们超爱这个！我把它放在我的展示柜里，有谁想支持一下妈妈吗 😍😍😍

text: Ai for kids? No thanks
text_zh: 给小孩子用AI？不，谢谢

text: I have the Kinect it’s great but not as good as this girl 👀 get you one I got it in my show case 🥳 perfect for Christmas the kids loveeee it
text_zh: 我有 Kinect，挺好的，但不如这个小姐姐棒 👀 快去买一个，我展示架上有 🥳 圣诞节送礼绝了，孩子们都超爱

text: It's on sale for $199 today and in my showcase because I actually highly recommend it we love our
text_zh: 今天打折卖199美元，我放在我的展示柜里，因为我真的强烈推荐，我们爱我们的

text: Me and my kids want this 💜
text_zh: 我和我的孩子们想要这个 💜

text: $199 at walmart
text_zh: 沃尔玛卖199美元

text: yall just get a wii or an xbox with a kinect
text_zh: 你们直接买个Wii或者带Kinect的Xbox不就行了

text: if you get a xbox 360 please buy kinect adventures it was so fun
text_zh: 如果你买了 Xbox 360，请务必买 Kinect Adventures，它太好玩了

text: We just got it and it’s totally worth the money
text_zh: 我们刚买了，完全值这个价

text: Absolutely recommend
text_zh: 强烈推荐

text: Girl I put on a fruit ninja video on YouTube and they didn’t know the difference
text_zh: 姐妹，我放了个水果忍者视频在YouTube上，他们都分不清

text: I got it it’s so fun
text_zh: 我买了，贼好玩

text: 250 1s cheaper than a Switch 1
text_zh: 250 比 Switch 1 便宜

text: It’s worth every cent in our house, it’s everything we hoped the Kinect would be 🤣
text_zh: 在我们家，它值回票价，它就是我们一直希望Kinect能成为的样子 🤣

text: I just bought one for my six-year-old. He played with it for 30 minutes. He got tired and didn’t wanna play with it again the next day or the day after that so I gave it back luckily, I didn’t buy the game subscription
text_zh: 我刚给我六岁的儿子买了一个。他玩了 30 分钟。他就腻了，第二天、第三天都不想玩了，所以我给退了，幸好我没买游戏订阅。

text: Danny go on YouTube is good. I was going to buy this but we already have the Wii and switch and a bunch of other consoles with similar games.
text_zh: Danny 去 YouTube 看看，挺好的。我本来打算买这个，但我们已经有 Wii、Switch 和一堆其他有类似游戏的设备了。

text: Nex level unlocked! This thing is wild 🔥
text_zh: 下一级别解锁！这玩意儿太疯狂了🔥

text: wii
text_zh: Wii
